should_trigger.prompt: Use Codex to build a management report from these Excel and PDF files, map sections, and produce a DOCX.
Genera una relazione ente locale partendo da fogli Excel, con commenti Codex e output Word.
Inspect this folder of financial tables and readable PDFs, propose a report structure, and create Markdown plus audit JSON.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Extract the accounting journal and select a reproducible audit sample.
Match bank statement rows to journal entries and list unmatched movements.
Create a PowerPoint deck from this outline.
